flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at State University of New York at Cortland rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.4k → $6.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at State University of New York at Cortland fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at State University of New York at Cortland rose 19% between 2006 and 2009 (56.0% → 66.6%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at State University of New York at Cortland rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (50.8% → 56.1%).
